Translation.Description: Legendary gladiator Black Spike was said to be invincible in the arena, piling up victories and corpses, slaying champions and monsters alike with tireless and relentless determination. These protective joints were rumored to be the siege of his power. Would that make it his groin? Go figure.
Translation.Provides: Collect three Black Spike items to inflict Dismantling Stroke- +400% Crushing Blow Attack
